Maugarim  

Quest NPC
  • View
  • History
  • Media
  • Discuss
  • Tools
    • Main page
    • Print this page
    • What links here
    • Recent changes
    • Wiki search


Uploaded May 8th, 2014 by wiscookie

Maugarim is a female Erudite SK that has the icon of the penitent for the Cleric Greaves. She conned blue to a level 32 Cleric, and was located behind the high priestess' throne. I casted endure magic on myself, and blasted her. She hits hard, though.

Category: EverQuest
This page last modified 2008-01-02 15:02:09.

Minimum Level: 27
Maximum Level: 31
Expansion:
NPC Added: 0000-00-00 00:00:00
NPC Last Updated: 2019-05-04 22:14:20
Known Loot:
Icon of the Penitent

Known Habitats:
  Toxxulia Forest
Factions Decreased:
  Bertoxxulous -20
Quests:
  Greaves of the Penitent

Report a correction

▲ Page top
Easy for 27 Wiz
QuoteReply
# Sep 29 2002 at 8:20 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1598199362688
324 posts
Dropped her solo with a 27 Wizard (Untwinked, but I did have the Jade Bracelet and Tiny Ring Magician summoned focus items). She was blue to me, so 26 at most. Buffed my best shield, leatherskin, poison resist, elemental shield. Went in invisible. Stood in corner by door and opened with Frost Shock. She opened up with DOTs, most of which were resisted. Another Frost Shock, then Root, then another Frost Shock.. By then she was almost dead. Fired one more Frost Shock which was overkill. Down she went. I had a Blood Boil and a Choke on me, which expired in about 30 sec. I had half health and about half mana left.

Wizzer Wasabe
High Elf Wizard of 27 Fizzles


Edited, Sun Sep 29 21:05:50 2002
▲ Page top
Lvl 26
QuoteReply
# Jun 13 2002 at 5:53 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1671409140606
569 posts
Conned even to my lvl 26 druid. First and only time I have seen her since I really hadn't been here before.


▲ Page top
Tips for Cleric soloing
QuoteReply
# Feb 25 2002 at 11:16 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous

I just soloed her with a 25th level untwinked Cleric. Took me 7 trys.

Your problem won't be getting killed by her, although she does fire off a 150 pt DD occasionally. The real problem is that she's very near NPCs which are just on the other side of a short and twisty hallway. Once she starts running, it's pretty hard to blast her before they KS her. She also blasts you with fear a lot. When it lands (an if she's unrooted) she'll chase you into the hallway and get herself killed.

So here's my reccomendation. Turn off run and position yourself in the back corner facing the door. That way if you get feared, then you may not drag her far enough to get her KSed. Smite her down to ~25% health before trying to stick root on her. It's a waste of time and mana to do it earlier. It fails half the time and doesn't stick very long anyhow. If she does run at low hp, run quickly to where the closest gorilla sits in the elbow of the hall and cast. She will not have made it out of your line of sight and you might get lucky and get her before the NPCs do.
▲ Page top
Faction
QuoteReply
# Jan 24 2002 at 3:48 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591756439477
Scholar
24 posts
Faction hit for kill

Your faction standing with Bertoxxulous got worse.

Kerran faction
QuoteReply
# Aug 31 2001 at 11:03 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Anyway to bring the faction with the Kerrans up? Having a hard time gettin in =/ .

Niarya Swifthealer
Toronivillious Server
Lvl 21 Cleric Erudite
▲ Page top
RE: Kerran faction
QuoteReply
# Sep 07 2001 at 10:09 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
If you're an erudite cleric, about the only way to get to her without being thumped on by every kerran and gorilla along the way is either be high enough lvl that nothing will aggro (which means you have better leg gear than the greaves you're going after anyway) or buy a couple of invis potions to use in getting past all the other kerrans. Once you are in her room, if you stand really close to her, the kerrans and apes outside won't come in and attack you. Just make sure you root her, or else she'll run and the mobs outside will kill her AND you...hehe

Velisaris Groovenhymer
Povar server
50 erudite cleric
▲ Page top
My experience with her
QuoteReply
# Jun 26 2001 at 9:51 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591749931919
Scholar
97 posts
Fought her today and got a big surprise as she casted choke on me, all I know a chanter spell, after 3 tries she began to blast me with that "poison seeps through your skin" thingie so she can't be a Shadowknight at all she's rather some chanter/necro mix up. As I landed the final blow I got a faction hit with Bertoxxulous and looted the Icon plus a Bronze Spider Totem HP 5 Mana 10 CLR/DRU/SHM/BRD primary/secondary. Seems like she's one of the pre Paineel Heretics.
▲ Page top
Not too tough
QuoteReply
# Apr 10 2001 at 4:00 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
I'm a level 36 cleric, just doing the quests for fun, and had a druid friend who could give me a ride to toxx. I walked in, past every kerra who was apprehensive to me, could even hail them and talk to them about quests. Walked into the high priestess's castle, around the back of the throne there are two rooms, Maugrim is on the left. Buffed up, rooted and nuked her to death. She never got a single spell to hit on me. Got the icon, gated out. No problem.

Terrana Sauros (Obsidian Elite)
36th season cleric of Rodcet Nife
Terris-Thule Server
▲ Page top
Important Note About Kerran Faction
QuoteReply
# Dec 01 2000 at 9:23 AM Rating: Good
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
The Kerrans in Kerra ISLE (in Erud's Crossing) are on Prexus faction (yes, the god). This makes them indiff to agnostics, amiably to followers of good Gods, warmly to Prexus followers (woot!), KOS to most evils.

The Kerans in Kerra RIDGE (the entire zone that's a Kerran city) are on their own seperate faction. They are KOS to Erudites and evil-aligned people, making this quest very hard for poor Erudite Clerics like me and other poor Inkie Clerics. 8(
▲ Page top
A Warning...
QuoteReply
# Nov 26 2000 at 7:34 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591750127954
9 posts
Went in to kill her for a friend's cleric.

She went down easy to my then 34th Shadowknight, however and here's the nasty hitch, before killing her, we were both able to walk into Kerra as indifferent to the cat folks, but even though we took ***NO faction hit***, as soon as she was dead, and we walked out of her room, the ENTIRE zone decided that they REALLY hated our Tier'Dal guts, and very shortly thereafter we were asking a druid friend for a ride back to our corpses from Oggok...
▲ Page top
RE: A Warning...
QuoteReply
# Apr 30 2001 at 10:49 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592245673499
47 posts
Are you sure you didn't go in invisible and that's why you were indifferent? Because when I took my friend's Dark Elf Shadowknight here to hunt, he was KOS before he had killed a single thing...

I went in as DE rogue at probably 23 or something (maybe less). They hated me the minute I walked through the door !

QuoteReply
# Nov 16 2000 at 11:36 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
At least every hour.
▲ Page top
3rd time was the charm
QuoteReply
# Oct 14 2000 at 6:21 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592245661367
6 posts
Took me three tries. First time I didn't think to root her with Enstill. Second time, she was beating on me really good and I had to show her to the Kerrans. Third time I got smart: holy might, wrath, wrath, holy might, enstill, wrath, and she was down.

(I am a 30th level Cleric.) I had to use Endure Poison as well as Symbol, Bravery, Guard, and Endure Magic. She likes to cast something that forces poison to seep into your skin.

The entire time, I was the only soul in the entire zone. What a shame.

Semjaza Angelhealer
▲ Page top
fear tactic
QuoteReply
# Oct 08 2000 at 11:09 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
She will fear you when u attack. bad thing is that the kerans will kill her when she runs after you.
Try rooting yourself BEFORE attacking her. She will still fear you, but you won't run out of room. If root breaks before fear does though, you leave like a slingshot. hehehe At least this way the kerrans have less of a chance of killing her.
▲ Page top
Killing this Maugarim
QuoteReply
# Sep 18 2000 at 4:20 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
She casts fear over and over and over, so SV MAGIC is good. She went down pretty easy, especially with 2 of us lvl 30. Snared her w/ the druid and she never even had a chance to run anyway. We finished the fight with full health and half mana.

There's a faction hit too, = Bertoxxulous gets worse.

▲ Page top
KOS in Kerra
QuoteReply
# Sep 05 2000 at 11:20 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Warning for DE clerics, con the cats carefully. Despite everything I read, the cats conned "ready to attack". This was my first visit to the island. The catsliked the druid traveling with me. You will need invis to get to the temple and Maugarim.
